criterion: Conversation history entries should display meaningful titles for scannability
description: Many conversation entries in the RECENTS sidebar display only timestamps (e.g., 'Mar 21 at 9:15 PM') instead of meaningful conversation titles. Approximately 15+ entries show this pattern, making it hard to find past conversations.
expected: Each conversation entry shows a descriptive title summarizing the conversation topic
actual: Multiple entries show only timestamps like 'Mar 21 at 9:15 PM', 'Mar 21 at 2:53 PM', etc., with no descriptive title
suggested_fix: Ensure the conversation title generation runs for all conversations. For conversations that fail to generate a title, fall back to the first user message preview rather than a raw timestamp.

criterion: Navigation items should have clear, predictable behavior
description: Clicking the 'Search' sidebar navigation item returns to the Chat view rather than opening a dedicated search interface. The search functionality is embedded as a filter textbox in the sidebar, but users may expect a dedicated search page.
expected: Clicking 'Search' opens a recognizable search interface or focuses the search input with visual emphasis
actual: Clicking 'Search' navigates to the Chat view; the filter textbox in the sidebar is the only search mechanism
suggested_fix: When 'Search' is clicked, auto-focus the filter textbox and optionally expand it or show a search overlay to make the search action more explicit.
